subcodes.first_line: O ‘Abdu’l-Vahhab! During His first journey to Iraq, the Blessed Beauty met a young man by the name of Mírza ‘Abdu’l-Vahhab
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبدالوهاب در سفر اول جمال قدم بعراق عرب جوانی را ملاقات فرمودند نامش میرزا
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment
